query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, awayModelSpread, homeModelSpread, modelTotal, modelAwayML, modelHomeML, spreadEdge, spreadDiff, totalEdge, totalDiff FROM games WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-08' AND sport = 'ncaam' ORDER BY startTimeEst LIMIT 40;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, awayModelSpread, homeModelSpread, modelTotal, modelAwayML, modelHomeML, spreadEdge, spreadDiff, totalEdge, totalDiff FROM games WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-08' AND sport = 'ncaam' ORDER BY startTimeEst LIMIT 40;
